Ordering Notes
All prices are in USD • Minimum order 300 units per SKU unless noted • Custom logo setup included • Lead time 20–30 business days after logo approval • Payment: 50% deposit, 50% on delivery • Additional silkscreen colors: +$0.36/unit • All prices subject to applicable taxes

Why Meyenberg
Quality You Can Brand
Meyenberg Amenidades has supplied luxury hotels and hospitals across Mexico for over 25 years. Distributed in the US exclusively through Mexausa Food Group, Inc.
25+ Years in Hospitality
Meyenberg has supplied 4- and 5-star hotels and private hospitals across Mexico. Every product meets hospitality-grade standards for consistency and presentation.
Hypoallergenic Formulas
Soaps and skincare are hypoallergenic, ideal for diverse guest populations including sensitive skin, children, and healthcare settings.
Full Custom Branding
Your logo on every item — silkscreen, embroidery, or printed label. All branding setup costs included in the unit price. No hidden fees.
20–30 Day Lead Time
After logo approval and deposit confirmation, production and delivery completed in 20–30 calendar days. Rush options available.
Chain-Scale Pricing
Volume pricing designed for hotel groups purchasing 300–10,000+ units. Additional quantity discounts available for multi-property commitments.
US Distribution via MFG
Mexausa Food Group, Inc. handles all US import documentation, logistics coordination, and customer service. One point of contact for your team.
Manufactured by
